'''Lo-Jad''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in the decades leading up to the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]; an event which would later be recognized as part of the end of the [[Golden Age of the Old Republic]].

==Biography==
A [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], Lo-Jad was raised to the rank of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] in the final decades of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Selecting [[Jedi Initiate/Legends|Initiate]] [[Sia-Lan Wezz]] as his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], Master Lo-Jad sent his apprentice to study at the [[Royal House of Learning/Legends|Royal House of Learning]] in [[Theed/Legends|Theed]], the capitol city of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] in the [[Chommell sector/Legends|Chommell sector]].<ref name="IOTA" />

==Appearances==
